meta.title: Productize Your ICS Security Program
meta.description:
We often groan over the 'lack of awareness' among our stakeholders — but is it their security awareness that is lacking, or our understanding of their perspective?

Product management, a discipline born in the software industry, addresses similar challenges. Product managers often translate business strategy into a product roadmap, manage various internal stakeholders, and focus on delivering a product loved by the core customers.

Tomomi shows you how to think of your security program as a service (product), and your stakeholders as customers. She guides you through practical use cases, demonstrating how these principles can be effectively applied to improve your ICS security program. Get ready to communicate more effectively, plan more strategically, and turn your security program into a product your stakeholders will love!
